meaning: n.公司,(合伙)商号adj.结实的,坚硬的,坚定的,坚固的,牢固的,稳固的,严格的vt.使牢固,使坚定vi.变稳固,变坚实adv.稳固地,坚定地
examples: She held firm to her principles.
The firm has excellent customer relations.
He is firm but not doctrinaire.
They are joined by American firm James Corner Field Operations and Agence Ter from France.
Based near Frankfurt, the firm survived two world wars, including a 1944 bombing raid.
